notes: Achievement + unlock catalogue. Each entry declares an id, title, description, trigger condition, and an optional reward. Conditions are evaluated by TarotGauntletGame on _trigger_win and _trigger_loss; un-cleared achievements that newly satisfy fire SaveSystem.mark_unlocked(unlock_key) and any reward. The AchievementsPanel reads this list + SaveSystem to render the codex of what's been earned.

achievements.title: FIRST LEAP
achievements.desc: Win any Tarot Gauntlet scenario for the first time.

achievements.title: REVERSED, FIRST TIME
achievements.desc: Lose any Tarot Gauntlet scenario for the first time. There is always another night.

achievements.title: JOHN'S WHOLE SHIFT
achievements.desc: Win all three Fool scenarios (THE LEAP, THE RUSH, FULL HOUSE).

achievements.title: FRASIER'S WHOLE EVENING
achievements.desc: Win all three Magician scenarios (SINKING FEELING, WATCH PARTY, BLOW OUT THE CANDLES).

achievements.title: ELICIA'S WHOLE NIGHT
achievements.desc: Win all three Pomegranate Hour scenarios (A PRODUCTIVE NIGHT, THE CONVERSATION, THE LONG EDIT). The show is still not finished. That was never the win.

achievements.title: NICOLA'S WHOLE TABLE
achievements.desc: Win all three Empress scenarios (STATIC BLOOM, HARVEST DINNER, ICE IN THE RIVER).

achievements.title: DANTE'S WHOLE DAY
achievements.desc: Win all three Emperor scenarios (DOCKET, FIRST SESSION, APPEAL).

achievements.title: SYSOP'S WHOLE BOARD
achievements.desc: Win all three Hierophant scenarios (GREEN PHOSPHOR, THE LONG SIGNAL, BROADCAST NIGHT).

achievements.title: THE FIRST SEPTENARY
achievements.desc: Win at least one scenario in each of the first 7 arcanas (Fool through Chariot).

achievements.title: WITHOUT A WALK-OUT
achievements.desc: Win any scenario without a single visitor walking out.

achievements.title: KEPT THE FAITH
achievements.desc: Win any scenario with Doubt at 0 at the moment of LEAP.

achievements.title: THE ROOM HELD
achievements.desc: Win any scenario with Stagnation under 4 at the moment of LEAP.

achievements.title: THE CANDLES ARE LIT
achievements.desc: Light the candles in BLOW OUT THE CANDLES.

achievements.title: THE LONG QUIET HELD
achievements.desc: Use THE LONG QUIET ability in a Priestess session.

achievements.title: MARKED THEIR PLACE
achievements.desc: Use THE TIDELINE ability in an Empress session.

achievements.title: THE OFFICE RULED
achievements.desc: Use THE DECREE ability in an Emperor session.

achievements.title: SURVIVOR · MAGICIAN
achievements.desc: Win a Magician scenario with at least one demon active at the moment of LEAP — the room was working against you and you made it anyway.

achievements.title: THE SINKHOLE OPENS
achievements.desc: Lose BLOW OUT THE CANDLES with the steamboat finished. The river found the bank.

achievements.title: A PAIR
achievements.desc: Win the LOVERS scenario with both characters at the same threshold.

achievements.title: THE APARTMENT HELD
achievements.desc: Win all three Lovers scenarios (THE LAST BOXES, AN AFTERNOON, THE LETTER IN THE DRAWER).

achievements.title: CORA'S WHOLE ROUTE
achievements.desc: Win all three Chariot scenarios (DEPOT TO DEPOT, LATE RUN, THE LONG QUIET ROAD).

achievements.title: THE CONVERSATION HAPPENED
achievements.desc: Lock Ep. 17 in THE CONVERSATION — the Two-Chairs Women begin speaking after twenty years.

achievements.title: DAVEY SPEAKS
achievements.desc: Sit with Davey through his full beat in THE LONG EDIT — play the cue 14 draft he marked 'please don't use this one.'

achievements.title: ELICIA AT 21
achievements.desc: Sit with Young Elicia through the Hi8 tape. Record over the last thirty seconds.

achievements.title: THE OFFICE UNDER GLASS
achievements.desc: Win JOHN'S REVIEW — survive the back-office meeting and get back on the line for the lunch rush. The first guest-lens scenario: John on the Emperor's board.

achievements.title: AN EPISODE WAS MADE
achievements.desc: Advance any Pomegranate Hour episode by two states in a single Priestess scenario.
